_meta.description: Google GKE Module — minimal database schema. Only stores module configuration. All workload, CronJob, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, and email data is queried live from GKE/GCP APIs. Cluster credentials are stored in api/config/ClusterConfig.json (not in DB).

tables.name: gke_module_config
tables.description: Consolidated module configuration — key-value store with JSONB values. Stores: poller settings (enabled, interval), monitored workloads list, alert thresholds, email provider config, log alert rules. Same pattern as HealthCheck module's hc_module_config.
